description: Nine-run protected sequencing scan on the no-distance edge-graph control branch. The weaker bounded-path kernel from C0.8 is kept fixed, but the motif ladder is extended to tri-root and three-layer constructions before adjacency-versus-weaker-kernel inconsistency is forced.
architecture_notice: This branch keeps graph size, the clustered / corridor / triad representative families, the projected-transverse sector, and the shell-weight measurement vocabulary fixed. Only the forcing family changes: the weaker bounded-path survivor kernel from C0.8 is retained, while the motif ladder is upgraded from bi-root and two-layer motifs to tri-root and three-layer constructions.
baseline_notice: C0.9 inherits the corrected C0.6 positive-mismatch forcing logic and the C0.8 bounded-path kernel, keeps the protected topology-stability rule active, and asks whether tri-root / 3-layer motifs can scale the partial C0.8 inconsistency signal into broad protected irreversibility under adjacency-versus-bounded-path alternation.

base_seed_reference.selection_note: same frozen packet family and representative seeds used in Paper 24.1 and C0.1-C0.8

forcing_protocols.label: Noise-seeded tri-root inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: Use the exact C0.3 incidence-noise ladder as the forcing schedule, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

forcing_protocols.label: Tri-root motif-seeded inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: Use the tri-root and 3-layer motif ladder as the forcing schedule, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

forcing_protocols.label: Hybrid noise plus tri-root inconsistency
forcing_protocols.definition: At each step combine the scheduled incidence-noise perturbation with the scheduled tri-root / 3-layer motif injection, then alternate adjacency and the weaker bounded-path survivor map once mismatch is live.

runs.notes: Noise-seeded tri-root inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Noise-seeded tri-root inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Noise-seeded tri-root inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
Tri-root motif-seeded inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Tri-root motif-seeded inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Tri-root motif-seeded inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
Hybrid tri-root inconsistency forcing on the clustered composite anchor.
Hybrid tri-root inconsistency forcing on the counter-propagating corridor.
Hybrid tri-root inconsistency forcing on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
